title: What to Know About the Stabbing Attack Against 2 Jewish Men in London
summary_full: The British police said the attack on Wednesday was being treated as terrorism, and they warned of rising antisemitic hate crimes.
summary_public: The British police said the attack on Wednesday was being treated as terrorism, and they warned of rising antisemitic hate crimes.
